o 1o 1

[...] x mU₄—d60 iš-ṭur-ma? x [...]

[...] ... Oannes wrote and ... [...]

o 22

[...] LU₂ iš-⸢ṭur⸣ [...]

[...] ... wrote [...]

o 33

[...] ina re-eš DINGIR-MEŠ iš-ṭur [...]

[...] he wrote at the service of the gods [...]

o 44

[...] ina re-eš MUL ša₂-ma-mi iš-ṭur [...]

[...] he wrote at the service of a heavenly star [...]

o 55

[...] mi-ḫi-le-e-ti [...]

[...] lines [...]

o 66

[...]-MEŠ a-na šu-um da-nu₃ [...]

[...]s on account of Anu [...]

o 77

[...] ⸢d⸣LAMMA : 1 lim 2 me ŠU mi-ḫi-le-e-⸢ti⸣ [...]

o 88

[...] lines ... [...]
